title: Invite users directly from views
description:
Project admins can now invite new users to Jira Product Discovery without leaving their current view. This change makes it easier to add collaborators and stakeholders to your project as you work, removing the need to navigate away to project settings or sharing menus. To get started with this change: Open any view in your Jira Product Discovery project.
	Locate the visitors stack in the view header.
	Select Invite next to the visitors stack.
	Enter the details of the users you want to add in th
